changes: Added end-to-end test coverage for desktop audio recording finalization.
Restored artifact pills for explicitly delivered files created on your Desktop by delegated agents.
OpenClaw and Hermes requests now stay in the primary agent's model-driven tool loop instead of being parsed into deterministic UI handoffs.
Restores automatic Rewind capture in named development bundles after Screen Recording is granted, including smooth recovery from lock-screen transitions.
Keeps the notch centered and clear of hover controls throughout push-to-talk and voice responses
Fixed the first push-to-talk turns after launch or a completed Gemini response being delayed by redundant realtime-session reconnects
Restored artifact pills when a delegated agent explicitly reports a verified temporary deliverable, such as an HTML page.
Keeps the user's screen-capture preference enabled when transient Rewind monitoring stops, so capture can recover instead of silently staying disabled.
Sign in with Apple now shows your real name during onboarding instead of "there"
Fixed generated artifact cards across main and notch chat, and kept Screen Recording prompts on the normal voice path
Improved reliability when finalizing recordings after reconnecting
Omi Beta and other named desktop builds now show their installed version in the window title
Fixed Rewind pausing silently when macOS cannot capture the current window
Fixed Mac task views disagreeing after a task was cancelled or superseded
